metrics.top_terms: evidence, convergence, node, empirical, strip, proof, badge, html, marker, main, reinforcement, meant, structurally, that, architecture

sections.title: Convergence & Evidence
sections.text:
The empirical reinforcement strip and what it is meant to do structurally inside the proof.
::::
:::::: badge-row
::: badge

sections.title: Oxford convergence
sections.text:
The evidence strip is not trying to prove every metaphysical claim directly. It is showing that several independent lines are argued to converge on the same shape of reality.
::: eq
4 / 7 independently confirmed
:::
:::::
::::: {.node .evidence}
::: tag

sections.title: ECP
sections.text:
Used here as a convergence signal rather than a standalone worldview proof.
::: eq
6σ
:::
:::::
::::: {.node .evidence}
::: tag

sections.title: PEAR
sections.text:
Placed in the strip as another statistical support node.
::: eq
6.3σ
:::
:::::
::::: {.node .evidence}
::: tag

sections.title: PROP-COSMOS
sections.text:
Presented as a further line reinforcing the convergence architecture.
::: eq
5.7σ
:::
:::::
:::::::::::::::
::: callout
The evidence layer is structurally downstream from the logical architecture. It is not the foundation of the framework. It is an evidentiary reinforcement strip meant to show that the proof is not living only in abstract language.
:::
::: footer-nav
[← Bifurcation](bifurcation.html)[Falsification Court →](falsification.html)
:::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::

claims.forward_test: If the claim is true, the described pattern should appear where the paper says it should appear.
claims.reverse_test: If the pattern can appear without the proposed framework, the claim should be downgraded or narrowed.
claims.evidence_bar: No explicit evidence marker in sentence.
claims.kill_conditions: Needs an explicit failure case: what observation, logic result, or counterexample would make this claim false?
claims.not_claimed: Does not by itself claim that physics proves theology.
claims.proof_boundary: Current boundary: deterministic pass classifies this as Formal Model, not a final proof.
